name: document-ingestion
description: Tokenize and save documents into the RAG system. Handles chunking strategy, metadata extraction, and embedding storage for later retrieval.

document_path.description: Path to the document file or URL

collection.description: RAG collection name to store chunks in

steps.template:
Step 2 — Chunking strategy for '{{chunk_strategy}}':
- Split document into semantically meaningful chunks
- Maintain context overlap between adjacent chunks (10-15%)
- Preserve code blocks and tables as atomic units
- Tag each chunk with: source, position, section heading, metadata

Step 3 — Quality checks:
- Verify no chunk exceeds token limit
- Ensure no critical context is split across chunks
- Add cross-references between related chunks
